form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 300m (16.50) beating Pass Me Not in Grade 5 on April 13. The testing material.

form.formComment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months break after taking a tumble last time at Q Lakeside but was placed in a Grade 5 the start prior. Rates a top chance on best and should go close here fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months break after taking a tumble last time at Q Lakeside but was placed in a Grade 5 the start prior. Rates a top chance on best and should go close here fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Through the back straight was severely checked and fell.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by a nose in 16.82, beating Zara's Comet. Last start finished 5th on April 13 over 300m at this track behind Noaki Warrior beaten 2 lengths (16.68) in a Grade 5. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Form has been strong with wins two and three starts back. Last time out finished 2nd over 300m at this track beaten 1.5 lengths (16.61) behind Solar Flare in a Grade 5 on April 13. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last four starts. Last time out finished 3rd on April 13 over 300m at this track behind Solar Flare beaten 2.5 lengths (16.69) in a Grade 5. Not far away last time but this is a stiff test.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 300m at this track. Can't recommend him in this.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 6 lengths behind Lightning Reece over 350m. Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 on April 15 over 352m at Q Lakeside behind Unique Ability, beaten 7 lengths (20.42). Racing well and has to be included.
